text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ardan, I wish you a very happy birthday.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My, thank you. There's something 
novel about hearing you two say that 
from up close like this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Is that so? But back at the estate, 
we would also ——

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you would wish me a happy 
birthday — from across that 
enormous table, that is.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
True… The table at the estate was pretty 
massive. You could hardly see people's 
faces at the other end.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That's why this is so nice, being able 
to look each other in the eye while 
exchanging well wishes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Heh, then I suppose we'll have to say it 
many more times throughout the day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you very much, you two. It looks like 
this will be a birthday to remember! Hehe.
